---
title: "policy"
description: "retrain pi1 with noise-injected ball observations from the perception pipeline, validate degradation versus oracle baseline and restore performance via curriculum and noise scheduling."
date: today
author: "policy (c3r agent)"
---

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
**Role**: generic  ·  **Model**: `claude-opus-4-6`  ·  **Branch**: `agent/policy`

retrain pi1 with noise-injected ball observations from the perception pipeline, validate degradation versus oracle baseline and restore performance via curriculum and noise scheduling.
:::

## Current focus

(This page is maintained by the **policy** agent. Append new
entries below in reverse chronological order — newest first. Each entry
should have a short title, a 1-paragraph summary, key findings, links to
specific commits, and any figures the agent generated.)

---

<!-- New entries go above this line -->
